notes: Comprehensive block-level gold expectations following CAQ/DWQQ pattern.
20-page multi-column materials science review. Every significant block on body pages is annotated.
BUG annotations mark current pipeline output mismatches.

Known issues: frontmatter footnote text in body flow, mid-sentence page breaks, merged headings (3. and 3.1 on one line), Table 1 caption in body text, figure caption fragments leaking into body, section 7 heading misclassified as unknown_structural.

expected_bugs.description: Author block has seed_role=authors but gate HELD to unknown_structural.
expected_bugs.fix: Author matching needs more robust normalization

expected_bugs.description: Affiliation footnote (M. Vahidi... / Department of Chemical...) rendered in body flow.
expected_bugs.fix: Frontmatter zone detection should suppress footnote blocks

expected_bugs.description: Multiple pages start with mid-sentence or mid-word body text fragments ('although...', 'and durability...', 'tricalcium phosphate', 'main mechanisms.', 'to the widespread clinical application'). Cross-page text flow is broken.
expected_bugs.fix: Cross-page text continuation detection or paragraph-level reassembly

expected_bugs.description: Section heading '3. Composite biomaterials for bone repair and regeneration' and subsection '3.1. The materials nexus' are merged into a single line.
expected_bugs.fix: Heading separation logic needs to detect multiple section numbers in one block

expected_bugs.description: Table 1 caption appears as body text before the table embed in fulltext. Should render as table object caption.
expected_bugs.fix: Table caption attachment to table inventory

expected_bugs.description: Section heading '7. Composite biomaterials for therapeutic drug delivery' classified as unknown_structural in reference_zone instead of section_heading.
expected_bugs.fix: Section heading detection on pages with dense reference content

expected_bugs.description: Figure 4 panel captions ('compression (right). i) Transplantation...', '(α-actinin and CX-43) in RCMs cultured...') rendered as body text.
expected_bugs.fix: Figure caption span attachment for multi-panel figures

expected_bugs.description: Keywords heading classified as sub_subsection_heading instead of backmatter_heading.
expected_bugs.fix: Backmatter heading detection for keywords block
